wikimediacustomizations-bademaildomain-e: Error message shown during registration or email address change when the email address is disallowed. $1 is the banned domain.
wikimediacustomizations-forcereauth-erro: Used as an error message when the user has to reauthenticate. $1 is the reauthentication link.
wikimediacustomizations-donordelightbadg: Heading of the popover tooltip shown on the donor delight badge when a donor first encounters it.
Body text shown on the donor delight badge popover in experiment bucket B, with thank you message.
Body text shown on the donor delight badge popover in experiment bucket C, inviting the donor to tap the badge.
Label for the link shown at the bottom of the donor delight badge popover in experiment bucket B, which removes the badge from the page.
Title of the confirmation dialog shown after clicking the remove button
Body text of the confirmation dialog shown after clicking the remove button
Label of the button to confirm hiding the badge in the confirmation dialog shown after clicking the remove button
Label of the button to keep the badge in the confirmation dialog shown after clicking the remove button
